case_title: RORY WORLEY VS. DELANCEY STREET ET AL

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 58710980) FILED BY DEFENDANT DELANCEY STREET FOUNDATION (ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS DELANCEY STREET)

DISCOVERY 302, MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 2023.030(D) AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S ENTIRE COMPLAINT AGAINST DEFENDANT IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AND DEFENDANT IS AWARDED MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $500. (PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES), PAYABLE WITHIN (30) DAYS OF THE NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Section 2023.030(D) And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Elizabeth Dooley, of Lewis Brisbois, Tel. 415.362.2580, for defendants;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT DELANCEY STREET FOUNDATION Motion For Terminating Sanctions Pursuant To CCP Section 2023.030(D) And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Plaintiff's entire complaint against defendant is dismissed with prejudice and defendant is awarded monetary sanctions in the amount of $500. (per stipulation of the parties), payable within (30) days of the Notice of this Order. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Set For Trial On Dec-12-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
